title: All Root To Leaf Paths With Target Sum
hints: Think about traversing the tree. How can you keep track of the current path and its running sum as you move from parent to child?
Use Depth First Search (DFS). Pass the current path and remaining target sum down to recursive calls, adding the current node at each step.
A path is valid only if you reach a leaf node and the remaining sum is zero. Backtrack by removing the current node when returning from recursion.
